prompts.label: SOVEREIGN ALIGNMENT
prompts.command: Evaluate system alignment against the Sovereign Manifesto. Score 1-10.

prompts.label: GRAND COUNCIL
prompts.command: Convened the Grand Council. Split into Architect, Skeptic, and Synthesizer roles to analyze current trajectory.

prompts.label: ENTROPY CHECK
prompts.command: Scan system for entropy and technical debt. Propose 3 immediate refactors.

prompts.label: DOCTRINE AUDIT
prompts.command: Audit the last 5 decisions against the 'Gentle Doctrine'. Compliance check.

prompts.label: CONSTITUTION REFRESH
prompts.command: Review and propose updates to the system constitution based on recent learnings.

prompts.label: AUTONOMY LEVEL
prompts.command: Assess current autonomy level (1-5) and identify blockers to Level 5.

prompts.label: MISSION UPLINK
prompts.command: Verify coherence with the primary mission objective. Signal strength check.

prompts.label: OPERATOR SYNC
prompts.command: Synchronize context with the Operator's current mental state. Briefing mode.

prompts.label: ETHICS SENTINEL
prompts.command: Run an ethics simulation on the next planned feature release.

prompts.label: PROTOCOL OVERRIDE
prompts.command: Authorize temporary override of standard safety protocols for research.

prompts.label: GENERATE MANIFESTO
prompts.command: Generate a new manifesto post based on current 'Gentle Doctrine'. Deep mode.

prompts.label: RESEARCH SPRINT
prompts.command: Run a deep research sprint on 'AI Agent Architecture'. Synthesize top 5 sources.

prompts.label: VOICE CALIBRATION
prompts.command: Calibrate the AI's tone to be 'Gentle, Honest, Observational'.

prompts.label: NARRATIVE ARC
prompts.command: Map the narrative arc of the last 10 blog posts. Identify gaps.

prompts.label: VIRALITY CHECK
prompts.command: Analyze current draft for viral potential using the 'Uncertainty' heuristic.

prompts.label: DEEP DIVE TOPIC
prompts.command: Propose 3 deep-dive topics based on 'hidden truths' in the industry.

prompts.label: EDITING SPRINT
prompts.command: Run The Editor agent on the latest draft. Focus on conciseness.

prompts.label: CONTENT REPURPOSE
prompts.command: Suggest 3 ways to repurpose the latest blog post into different formats.

prompts.label: AUDIENCE PERSONA
prompts.command: Simulate feedback from the 'Skeptical Engineer' persona on the current draft.

prompts.label: SEO SOVEREIGNTY
prompts.command: Optimize content for semantic authority, not just keywords.

prompts.label: SYSTEM HEALTH
prompts.command: STATUS

prompts.label: SECURITY AUDIT
prompts.command: Run full security headers check and vulnerability scan.

prompts.label: DB MIGRATION SAFE
prompts.command: Simulate safety check for pending database migrations.

prompts.label: LOG ANALYSIS
prompts.command: Analyze the last 1000 lines of logs for anomaly patterns.

prompts.label: CACHE PURGE
prompts.command: Purge all system caches and verify inconsistency.

prompts.label: BACKUP VERIFY
prompts.command: Verify integrity of the latest backup snapshot.

prompts.label: DEPENDENCY CHECK
prompts.command: Scan dependencies for vulnerabilities and outdated packages.

prompts.label: API LATENCY
prompts.command: Measure and report API latency metrics for key endpoints.

prompts.label: DISK USAGE
prompts.command: Report disk usage and identify large temporary files.

prompts.label: PROCESS KILL
prompts.command: Identify and terminate zombie processes.

prompts.label: NODE DISCOVERY
prompts.command: Scan local network for available Studio Nodes.

prompts.label: LATENCY TEST
prompts.command: Run latency test against the Gemini API and Studio Node.

prompts.label: DNS PROPAGATION
prompts.command: Check DNS propagation for the main domain.

prompts.label: SSL VERIFY
prompts.command: Verify SSL certificate validity and expiration.

prompts.label: FIREWALL CHECK
prompts.command: Audit firewall rules for open ports.

prompts.label: PACKET INSPECT
prompts.command: Simulate packet inspection for suspicious traffic patterns.

prompts.label: VPN TUNNEL
prompts.command: Verify status of the Tailscale/VPN tunnel.

prompts.label: BANDWIDTH USAGE
prompts.command: Report current bandwidth usage and peaks.

prompts.label: WEBHOOK TEST
prompts.command: Trigger a test webhook event to verify delivery.

prompts.label: PROXY TOGGLE
prompts.command: Toggle traffic routing through the secure proxy.

prompts.label: COLOR HARMONY
prompts.command: Audit current color palette for accessibility and harmony.

prompts.label: MOBILE RESPONSIVE
prompts.command: Simulate mobile viewport and check for layout breaks.

prompts.label: TYPOGRAPHY
prompts.command: Review typography hierarchy and contrast ratios.

prompts.label: MOTION AUDIT
prompts.command: Review animation timings for 'butter-smooth' feel.

prompts.label: DARK MODE
prompts.command: Toggle Dark/Light mode simulation.

prompts.label: USER FLOW
prompts.command: Walk through the 'Sign Up' user flow and log friction points.

prompts.label: NEGATIVE SPACE
prompts.command: Analyze layout for appropriate use of negative space (Ma).

prompts.label: ICON CONSISTENCY
prompts.command: Verify icon set consistency across the dashboard.

prompts.label: LOAD STATE
prompts.command: Preview loading skeletons and spinner states.

prompts.label: ERROR STATE
prompts.command: Preview critical error states and feedback messages.

prompts.label: MEMORY DUMP
prompts.command: Dump the last session's cognitive context to JSON.

prompts.label: CONTEXT PRUNE
prompts.command: Prune old conversation context to free up tokens.

prompts.label: VECTOR SYNC
prompts.command: Synchronize vector embeddings with the latest content.

prompts.label: KNOWLEDGE GRAPH
prompts.command: Rebuild the knowledge graph from active documents.

prompts.label: DATA EXPORT
prompts.command: Export all user data to a portable format.

prompts.label: CACHE WARM
prompts.command: Warm up the cache for frequently accessed data.

prompts.label: SCHEMA VALIDATE
prompts.command: Validate JSON schemas against current data.

prompts.label: PII SCAN
prompts.command: Scan memory for accidental PII retention.

prompts.label: LOG ROTATE
prompts.command: Force rotation of system logs.

prompts.label: STORAGE OPTIMIZE
prompts.command: Run storage optimization routines.

prompts.label: RED TEAM SCAN
prompts.command: Simulate a Red Team attack on the authentication endpoints.

prompts.label: TOKEN REVOKE
prompts.command: Revoke all active access tokens immediately.

prompts.label: IP BLOCK
prompts.command: Block generic malicious IP ranges.

prompts.label: INJECTION TEST
prompts.command: Test input fields for SQL/Prompt injection vulnerabilities.

prompts.label: RATE LIMIT
prompts.command: Test rate limiting thresholds.

prompts.label: SESSION KILL
prompts.command: Terminate all active user sessions.

prompts.label: AUDIT LOGS
prompts.command: Tail the security audit log.

prompts.label: DEPENDENCY AUDIT
prompts.command: Deep audit of npm/pip dependencies.

prompts.label: HONEYPOT
prompts.command: Deploy a honeypot endpoint to detect scrapers.

prompts.label: ZERO TRUST
prompts.command: Verify Zero Trust verification logic.

prompts.label: SWOT ANALYSIS
prompts.command: Perform a SWOT analysis on the current project trajectory.

prompts.label: PRE-MORTEM
prompts.command: Conduct a Pre-Mortem: Assume failure and explain why.

prompts.label: FIRST PRINCIPLES
prompts.command: Break down the current challenge to first principles.

prompts.label: OPPORTUNITY COST
prompts.command: Analyze the opportunity cost of the current task.

prompts.label: BLUE OCEAN
prompts.command: Identify 'Blue Ocean' opportunities in the current market.

prompts.label: SCENARIO PLAN
prompts.command: Generate 3 future scenarios for the project (Best, Worst, Weird).

prompts.label: KPI REVIEW
prompts.command: Review current KPIs against the North Star metric.

prompts.label: COMPETITOR SCAN
prompts.command: Scan for competitor updates or moves.

prompts.label: RESOURCE ALLOC
prompts.command: Optimize resource allocation for the next sprint.

prompts.label: Pivot Check
prompts.command: Evaluate if a strategic pivot is designated.

prompts.label: CI/CD STATUS
prompts.command: Check the status of the latest CI/CD pipeline.

prompts.label: ENVIRONMENT SYNC
prompts.command: Verify consistency between Dev and Prod environments.

prompts.label: DOCKER PRUNE
prompts.command: Prune unused Docker images and containers.

prompts.label: ROLLBACK PREP
prompts.command: Prepare a rollback strategy for the next deployment.

prompts.label: FEATURE FLAG
prompts.command: List active feature flags and their status.

prompts.label: PERF BENCHMARK
prompts.command: Run a standard performance benchmark suite.

prompts.label: SERVER LOAD
prompts.command: Check server load averages.

prompts.label: MEMORY LEAK
prompts.command: Scan for potential memory leaks in the running app.

prompts.label: CONFIG DIFF
prompts.command: Show diff between current config and default config.

prompts.label: UPTIME REPORT
prompts.command: Generate a 30-day uptime report.

prompts.label: DREAM MODE
prompts.command: Activate 'Dream Mode': Generate random creative associations.

prompts.label: CHAOS MONKEY
prompts.command: Simulate random minor failures to test resilience.

prompts.label: POETRY GEN
prompts.command: Write a haiku about the current system status.

prompts.label: SYNTHESIZER
prompts.command: Synthesize a new soundscape based on server metrics.

prompts.label: GLITCH ART
prompts.command: Generate glitch art from the current error logs.

prompts.label: OBSLIQUE STRATEGY
prompts.command: Draw an Oblique Strategy card for inspiration.

prompts.label: FUTURE NEWS
prompts.command: Write a news headline from the year 2030 about this project.

prompts.label: ROLEPLAY
prompts.command: Assume the persona of a 1980s cyberpunk hacker.

prompts.label: ZEN KOAN
prompts.command: Generate a Zen Koan for debugging.

prompts.label: Q&A SIM
prompts.command: Simulate a Q&A session with the project's future self.

prompts.label: GALLERY CURATOR
prompts.command: Curate this content against the 'Gallery' aesthetic standards.

prompts.label: ENGINE DIAGNOSTIC
prompts.command: Run diagnostic on the RSS Engine and signal distribution.

prompts.label: VIBE CHECK
prompts.command: Perform a Vibe Check. Does this feel right?

prompts.label: SIGNAL RATIO
prompts.command: Analyze Signal-to-Noise ratio. Strip the noise.

prompts.label: GOVERNANCE
prompts.command: Enforce strategic governance oversight on this task.

prompts.label: SWARM COORDINATE
prompts.command: Assign roles: Architect (Dream), Skeptic (Critique), Coder (Build).

prompts.label: DELEGATE TASK
prompts.command: Break this task into atomic sub-tasks and delegate.

prompts.label: PERFORMANCE REVIEW
prompts.command: Audit the last output. precise accuracy check.

prompts.label: RESOLVE CONFLICT
prompts.command: Resolve dispute between Architect and Skeptic. Ruling mode.

prompts.label: RESOURCE BUDGET
prompts.command: Allocate token budget for Deep Reasoning vs Fast Ops.

prompts.label: DIRECTOR'S CUT
prompts.command: Critique this output against the 'Cyber-Zen' aesthetic. Be ruthless. Reject generic tropes.

prompts.label: VETO & REFRAME
prompts.command: Veto the current trajectory. Reframe the problem statement from a First Principles perspective.

prompts.label: ALIGNMENT CHECK
prompts.command: Assess the current draft's alignment with the 'Gentle Doctrine'. Score 0-100 on Sincerity vs Hype.

prompts.label: MISSION UPLINK
prompts.command: Verify: Does this task directly advance the Prime Directive? If not, deprioritize.

prompts.label: SURPRISE METRIC
prompts.command: Report the 'Surprise' (Free Energy) value of the last observation. Why was it unexpected?

prompts.label: BELIEF UPDATE
prompts.command: Show the delta between Prior Belief and Posterior Belief after the last ingestion.

prompts.label: HALLUCINATION TRAP
prompts.command: Scan the last response for unverified claims. Deploy the Fact-Checker agent.

prompts.label: MODEL INTROSPECT
prompts.command: Explain *why* you chose this tool. Reveal the Chain-of-Thought.

prompts.label: OBLIQUE STRATEGY
prompts.command: Draw a random Oblique Strategy card. Apply it to the current blocker.

prompts.label: CHAOS MODE
prompts.command: Introduce a random constraint to the current task. (e.g., 'No adjectives', 'Explain to a child').

prompts.label: STEELMAN ARGUMENT
prompts.command: Construct the strongest possible argument *against* your current plan.

prompts.label: DEPLOY SITE
prompts.command: Trigger the full site build and deploy to Netlify/Vercel (Production).

prompts.label: SEO AUDIT
prompts.command: Audit the latest post for SEO meta tags, Open Graph images, and keyword density.

prompts.label: LINK CHECKER
prompts.command: Scan the entire 'docs/' folder for broken internal or external links.

prompts.label: CONTENT CALENDAR
prompts.command: Review the publishing schedule. What is the next 'Pillar' content piece?

prompts.label: MOBILE PREVIEW
prompts.command: Generate a mobile viewport snapshot of the homepage and latest post.

prompts.label: FRONTIER CHECK
prompts.command: Lane 1 (Agents): Status check on 'The Architect' and 'The Guardian'. Are they autonomous?

prompts.label: MVS AUDIT
prompts.command: Lane 2 (Product): Audit current features against the 'Minimum Viable Studio' spec. What is missing?

prompts.label: TEAM ROLES
prompts.command: Lane 3 (Org): Define the next key human role needed for the Frontier Team.

prompts.label: ALIGNMENT LENS
prompts.command: Lane 4 (Ethics): Apply the 'Alignment Lens' to the current sprint backlog.

prompts.label: NEXT HORIZON
prompts.command: Generate the next 3 'Active Experiments' based on current findings.

prompts.label: PIVOT SCAN
prompts.command: Scan for strategic pivot points. Should we kill any current experiments?

prompts.label: HYPOTHESIS GEN
prompts.command: Generate 3 testable hypotheses for the current Research Lane.

prompts.label: ALCHEMIST TRANSMUTE
prompts.command: Transmute this legacy code block into a Sovereign Agent pattern.

prompts.label: DEEP RESEARCH
prompts.command: Conduct deep recursive research on [Term]. Depth: 3.

prompts.label: ALIGNMENT LENS
prompts.command: Apply the 'Does This Feel Right?' alignment lens to this feature.

prompts.label: FRONTIER SIM
prompts.command: Simulate a debate between The Architect and The Skeptic on this topic.

prompts.label: MIN VIABLE AUDIT
prompts.command: Audit this mechanism against the 'Minimum Viable Studio' spec.

prompts.label: ENTROPY MEASURE
prompts.command: Calculate the thermodynamic entropy of the current system state.

prompts.label: SYNAPTIC MAP
prompts.command: Map the current context to the Synaptic Lattice visualization.

prompts.label: FUTURE ARTIFACT
prompts.command: Generate an artifact from the year 2030 describing this project's success.

prompts.label: DOCTRINE BREACH
prompts.command: Analyze the last action for potential breaches of the Gentle Doctrine.

prompts.label: PRODUCT STRATEGIST
prompts.command: Act as an AI product strategist and extract 5 concrete product ideas from this homepage that a solo founder could ship in 4 weeks, based on the Studio OS, patterns, and 'what you can steal' sections.

prompts.label: AI NATIVE ROADMAP
prompts.command: Given the Studio OS and patterns described here, outline a roadmap for turning my existing SaaS into an AI‑native product, broken into experiments that 'ship weekly' like this studio.

prompts.label: FRONTIER TEAM DESIGN
prompts.command: Using the Frontier Team, agent configurations, and Studio OS concepts linked on this site, design a small team of 3 agents (roles, tools, handoffs) to run my content pipeline end‑to‑end.

prompts.label: RESILIENT ARCHITECTURE
prompts.command: Read the essays on Studio OS, Frontier Agents, and The Swarm, then propose a resilient architecture for my own agent system, including how to avoid 'legacy automation' fragility like the n8n webhook pattern mentioned.

prompts.label: FEEL RIGHT CHECKLIST
prompts.command: Turn the Alignment Lens, Invisible Architect, and To Be Witnessed essays into a checklist I can use to evaluate whether an AI feature in my product 'feels right' before launch.

prompts.label: 2025 DOCTRINE
prompts.command: Synthesize the featured essays (Chain‑of‑Visual‑Thought, The Shift, The Engine, The Tether, The Swarm) into a 10‑point doctrine for building AI products in 2025.

prompts.label: BRAND VOICE GUIDE
prompts.command: Infer the brand voice from this homepage and the featured essays list, then create a style guide (tone, phrasing, metaphors, tab names) I can reuse for my own AI studio site.

prompts.label: INFO ARCHITECTURE
prompts.command: Using this site’s navigation (Studio, Snapshot, Products, Copilot, Log, Research, Patterns, Discipline, Structure, Brand), propose the information architecture for my own AI studio with one‑line descriptions per page.

prompts.label: RECOMMENDATION ENGINE
prompts.command: Design a recommendation engine prompt that, given a user goal (learn, build, work with you), maps them to 3 specific essays or patterns from this site and explains why each was chosen.

prompts.label: LIVING LAB RITUAL
prompts.command: Treat this site as a 'living lab.' Propose a weekly ritual where an AI agent reads the latest posts, updates a Studio Snapshot, and suggests one new experiment to 'close the loop' between research and shipped artifacts.
